title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 181.040 - Headquarters
text:
181.040.  Headquarters. — The headquarters of the state library shall be in Jefferson City in adequate and suitable quarters provided by the office of administration.
(RSMo 1939 § 14736, A.L. 1945 p. 1132 § 14735, A.L. 1991 S.B. 197) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13437; 1919 § 7180; 1909 § 8176 
Effective 7-1-93
